economic_notes: Saaiyouck Development Corporation investigates and pursues various business opportunities within traditional territories. A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership acquires and manages fishing licences and quota (12.99% interest). Related entity 0986442 BC Ltd. trades in crypto currency. Nation rents townhouse and condominium to related family members of Chief and Council.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated entities include Matasayno Sustainability Corporation and Matasayno Sustainability Limited Partnership (fully consolidated). GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership (12.99%) and Saaiyouck Development Corporation (100%). No schedule of remuneration provided. expenses_enterprises field used for Economic Development segment. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($360,054), Kwakiutl District Council ($5,574), Province of BC ($63,994), First Nations Health Authority ($52,250) = $481,872; osr adjusted accordingly. London Enterprises Ltd. revenue of $25,000 is deferred revenue recognition from a $250,000 land access payment received in 2017. Related party transactions noted: rental of townhouse and condominium to family members of Chief and Council at nominal amounts.
